overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, starting under a red-lit overpass, crossing an intersection with moderate traffic, encountering a police scene with NPCs, and continuing along a sidewalk with large digital billboards. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with cinematic neon-noir lighting and atmospheric volumetric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban street beneath highway overpass

events.description: vehicle with headlights on approaches through the fog in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the overpass through the foggy red-lit corridor

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating a covered corridor with red ambient lighting
tall street lamp emitting red-orange light through the fog
traffic signal mounted on black metal pole at the intersection ahead
derelict car parked on the side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking through a foggy urban corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass. The scene is bathed in red artificial light from street lamps, with abandoned vehicles lining the sides. The atmosphere is dense with volumetric fog, limiting visibility down the street where a single vehicle's headlights approach in the distance.

events.description: begins crossing the intersection, moving from sidewalk onto crosswalk stripes
pauses at traffic light as vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
group of people waiting on the opposite sidewalk near the crosswalk

entered.detail: white painted zebra crossing lines on the asphalt
large illuminated advertisement screen on the building facade
traffic signal showing red light suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a wider intersection, transitioning from red shelter to a more open space with mixed lighting. The ego crosses the asphalt crosswalk, pausing to let vehicles pass through the intersection. Digital billboards become visible on the right, and the concrete overpass structure remains overhead while the surroundings open up.

scene_state.functional_zone: street incident scene with police presence

events.description: screen fades to black and returns, transitioning to a new location with police car and NPCs
encounters group of NPCs gathered around a person lying on the ground

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a street incident involving police and civilians

notable_agents.action: person lying prone on the pavement, possibly injured or dead
individual standing over the person on the ground, appearing concerned or aggressive

entered.detail: police vehicle with flashing lights parked in the street
large commercial van blocking the street ahead
yellow and black striped concrete barrier

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene reveals a police car with flashing lights and a street incident. The ego approaches a group of NPCs gathered around a person lying on the ground near a delivery truck. The atmosphere remains foggy and dark, with the overpass structure still visible overhead. The camera moves past the incident, observing the scene before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with digital advertising displays

events.description: passes by pedestrians walking in the opposite direction along the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past other pedestrians, passing large illuminated billboards on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red tank top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screens covering the right wall displaying health warnings and product ads
bright yellow metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrow sidewalk lined with massive digital billboards on the right wall, casting bright neon light onto the foggy street. The ego walks past several pedestrians moving in the opposite direction, with yellow guardrails lining the left side. The overpass continues overhead, creating an enclosed urban canyon effect as the walk continues into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy urban canyon that evolves from a claustrophobic red-lit corridor into a bright, neon-saturated street. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass where dense volumetric fog and red artificial light obscure a road lined with abandoned vehicles. As the camera emerges from this shelter, the space opens into a wide intersection with mixed lighting, where the viewer crosses the asphalt while digital billboards first appear on the horizon. The scene then shifts toward a police incident, moving past flashing lights and a crowd of NPCs gathered near a delivery truck under the lingering shadow of the overpass. Finally, the path narrows onto a sidewalk where massive digital billboards cast vivid neon glows across the fog, guiding the camera past pedestrians and yellow guardrails deeper into the city.
